meta-description: Learn about primary care physicians by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Primary care physician
excerpt: A physician (M.D. – Medical Doctor or D.O. – Doctor of Osteopathic Medicine) who directly provides or coordinates a range of health care services for a patient.
content: A physician (M.D. – Medical Doctor or D.O. – Doctor of Osteopathic Medicine) who directly provides or coordinates a range of health care services for a patient.
